title: picris strigosa subsp. canescens
intro: Picris strigosa subsp. canescens, also known as a subspecies of Picris strigosa, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues and relieving pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing coughs, and aiding in the digestion process. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
